Device-facing endpoints for ESP32 firmware (HMAC auth required)
ESP32 posts sensor data for all active channels. The server maps channels to plant_ids and stores measurements. Uses upsert on (device_id, seq, plant_id) for idempotency.

header.description: (Required) Device UUID
(Required) Monotonic sequence counter stored in flash
(Required) Current Unix epoch seconds (must be within ±120s of server time)
(Required) Hex SHA-256 of the request body (empty string for GET requests)

(Required) base64url(HMAC-SHA256(secret, canonical_string)) where canonical_string = METHOD
PATH
X-Device-Id
X-Device-Seq
X-Device-Timestamp
X-Content-SHA256

exec: console.warn('[IoT Auth] DEVICE_ID or DEVICE_SECRET not set in environment.');
const canonical = [method, path, deviceId, seq, timestamp, bodyHash].join('\n');

description.content: Helper endpoints (species autocomplete, etc.)
Searches the Perenual API for plant species by name. Returns a list of matches with ID, display name, and thumbnail image URL.

REST API for MoonPlants — smart plant monitoring and automated watering system. Consists of two namespaces:

- **`/api/v1/`** — User-facing endpoints (Supabase JWT auth)
- **`/api/iot/v1/`** — Device-facing endpoints (HMAC-SHA256 auth)

Contact Support:
 Name: MoonPlants
